description_long: This motorcycle features a classic, vintage design with a matte olive-green fuel tank and matching front fender, paired with a black seat and rear fender. The frame is exposed, showing a prominent engine block and exhaust system, with visible wiring and mechanical components. The wheels are spoked and fitted with thin tires, giving it a lightweight and agile appearance. The handlebars are slightly curved, with a simple, utilitarian design, and the foot pegs and kickstand are visible. The overall build suggests a utilitarian, possibly military or early post-war civilian motorcycle, with minimal decorative elements. The materials and construction indicate durability and functionality, suitable for urban commuting or light touring.
description: A vintage-style motorcycle with an olive-green tank, black seat, spoked wheels, and exposed engine, designed for durability and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, olive-green tank, black seat, spoked wheels, and exposed engine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the curved handlebars, narrow front tire, and the width of the tank and seat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the engine, exhaust, and the overall symmetry of the motorcycle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the seat, rear fender, and the alignment of the wheels and handlebars.
